description_long: This is a modern, boxy chaise with a deep, dark green upholstered exterior and a compact, cubic form. The seat is generously padded, with a thick cushion that appears integrated into the frame, and the backrest and armrests are of equal height, creating a cozy, enclosed seating area. The upholstery is smooth and features subtle tufting on the inner surfaces of the backrest and arms, adding a touch of sophistication. The legs are short, straight, and dark, barely visible beneath the base, giving the chaise a low-profile stance. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible decorative elements aside from the tufting. This piece would fit well in urban parks, modern public spaces, or stylish outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, boxy dark green chaise with smooth, subtly tufted upholstery and short, straight legs. The design is minimalist and enclosed, with equal-height backrest and armrests.
description_view_0: Front view shows the deep seat, thick cushion, and the symmetrical, enclosed design with tufted backrest and armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the solid, boxy armrest and the depth of the seat, with tufting visible on the inner side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, unadorned back and the low-profile legs, emphasizing the chaise's cubic shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the armrest and the seat's depth, with subtle tufting detail.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, straight, and of equal height to the armrests, forming a continuous, boxy enclosure. It features subtle tufting with a few buttons, giving it a refined, modern look.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, matching the height and style of the backrest, and are straight and boxy.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and dark-colored, likely made of wood or metal, and are minimally visible beneath the base, contributing to a low-profile appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid dark green with a smooth texture and subtle tufting on the inner surfaces of the backrest and armrests. No visible patterns or prints are present.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, thick, integrated seat cushion and the backrest and armrests are padded, with no loose or additional cushions visible. The arrangement is simple and unified.
